label: Receiver Organization

backend.evidence: ReceiverInformation.organization_name stores the receiver singleton value saved by C.3.receiver.1.

frontend.evidence: SectionC3.tsx registers safetyReportIdentification.receiverOrganization (receiver block added in the frontend).

notes: App-local receiver organisation/address metadata. Not a C.3 element: official C.3 is the Sender block (mapped via SenderInformation) and the E2B receiver is identified only at message level (N.1.4 / N.2.r.3). Renamed from C.3.receiver.* to local.receiver.* so the code no longer implies an official C.3 sub-element.

label: Sender's (case) Safety Report Unique Identifier

backend.evidence: Case.safety_report_id is the case-level C.1.1 unique identifier (cases.safety_report_id, '-- C.1.1'); used by export/sections/c.rs report_unique_id and import extract_safety_report_id.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts safetyReportIdentification.safetyReportId from the case-form section source.

notes: Reclassified from backend_missing: the backend was already implemented but the registry pointed at the wrong model. Now mapped to Case.safety_report_id.

label: FDA Report Type

backend.evidence: Case.fda_report_type holds this app-local report type; persisted via the Case model.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts safetyReportIdentification.fdaReportType from the case-form section source.

notes: App-local FDA report-type classification stored on Case.fda_report_type. Re-pointed from the wrong SafetyReportIdentification model. Not an official element (official FDA report type is FDA.C.1.7.1 Local Criteria Report Type, mapped separately); possible concept overlap to revisit.

label: MFDS Report Type

backend.evidence: Case.mfds_report_type holds this app-local report type; persisted via the Case model.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts safetyReportIdentification.mfdsReportType from the case-form section source.

notes: App-local MFDS report-type classification stored on Case.mfds_report_type. Re-pointed from the wrong SafetyReportIdentification model. Not one of the 14 official MFDS KR extension elements; the .KR. token only satisfies the MFDS authority code rule.
